zh.Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾吉可比 馬洛里
zh.Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomasina Zouche於1318年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾吉可比 馬洛里時，她的父親William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche42歲，母親Maud Lovell39歲。她於大約1332年與Anketil Mallory結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1344年在英國萊希斯特斯爾吉可比 馬洛里享年26歲。

zh-hans.Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, England: 英国萊希斯特斯爾吉可比 馬洛里
zh-hans.Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomasina Zouche于1318年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾吉可比 馬洛里时，她的父亲William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche42岁，母亲Maud Lovell39岁。她于大约1332年与Anketil Mallory结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1344年在英国萊希斯特斯爾吉可比 馬洛里享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Chantal, Dominique, Francois, Herve, Michel, Rodolphe, Serge.
French (Fouché): variant of Foucher . Compare Fooshee , Foshee , Fouch , and Foushee .
Altered form (Fouché) of French Foucher (compare 1 above), found mainly in South Africa.

variants.name: Foucher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Etienne, Henri, Lydie, Marcel, Rosaire.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Folchari, composed of the elements folk, folc ‘people’ and hari ‘army’. Compare Faucher 2.

variants.name: Foushee
meanings: History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its original form Fouché) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Fouch
meanings: Altered form of   Fouts  , a surname of German origin.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Fudge  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomasina
meanings: A female name derived from Thomas

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomasina Zouche was born in 1318, in Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche, was 42 and her mother, Maud Lovell, was 39. She married Anketil Mallory about 1332. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1344, in Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomasina Zouche est née en 1318, à Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Maud Lovell, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Anketil Mallory environ 1332. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1344, à Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomasina Zouche 1318 in Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche 42 und ihre Mutter Maud Lovell 39. Sie hat um 1332 Anketil Mallory geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1344 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasina Zouche è nata il nel 1318 nel Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Maud Lovell, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Anketil Mallory circa 1332. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1344, nel Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルス
ja.lifeSummary: Thomasina Zoucheが1318年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアキルクビー マロリーで生まれた時，父William la Zouche 1st Baron Zoucheは42歳，母Maud Lovellは39歳であった。約1332年にAnketil Malloryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1344年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアキルクビー マロリーで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomasina Zouche(이)가 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 커크비 맬로리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Lovell(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 대략 1332년 Anketil Mallory(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1344년 영국 레이스스터실르 커크비 맬로리에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasina Zouche nasceu em 1318, em Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Maud Lovell, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Anketil Mallory aproximadamente 1332. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1344, em Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomasina Zouche родилась в 1318 г. в местности киркби маллори, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Lovell, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Anketil Mallory около 1332 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1344 г. в местности киркби маллори, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomasina Zouche nació en 1318, en Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William la Zouche 1st Baron Zouche, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Maud Lovell, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Anketil Mallory aproximadamente 1332. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1344, en Kirkby Mallory, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 26 años.
